# KK Store

KK Store is an Indian D2C e-commerce store offering quality products with
Cash on Delivery, fast shipping, and secure checkout.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kk-store.vercel.app/)
- [About Us](https://kk-store.vercel.app/about-us)
- [Contact](https://kk-store.vercel.app/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://kk-store.vercel.app/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://kk-store.vercel.app/terms-and-conditions)
- [Refund & Return Policy](https://kk-store.vercel.app/refund-and-return-policy)
